features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower
The Power of Nature: We’ve wedged 10 real lemons and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every 250ml bottle of shower gel. Our lemons are sourced from Sicily and handpicked by farmers

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature
Paraben free: The Lemon and Tea Tree shower wash has been consciously made without parabens.
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of freshness and nature with this 6 x shower gel multipack of 250 ml bottles
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a unique and zesty fragrance! Experience rapid refreshment with our Original Source Zesty Lemon & Tea Tree shower gel. We’ve wedged 10 real lemons and 100% natural fragrance into every 250ml bottle. Our lemons are sourced from Sicily. Growing lemons has always been an important part of Sicilian agriculture - 80% of all Italian production of lemons originate from the island and this has been true since Roman times! The lemons are handpicked by farmers and cold pressed to extract the 100% natural fragrance that goes straight into our shower gel. Our products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100% renewable energy and our bottles are 100% recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature! Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Citrus Medica Limonum (Lemon) Peel Oil, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Citrus Sinensis (Orange) Peel Oil Expressed, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Fruit Oil, Polyquaternium-7, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Citral, Citronellol, Limonene, CI 19140, CI 14700. Directions Use Within Recommended Period – Check jar symbol on package for months of use after opening. Box Contains 6 x Original Source Shower Gel Lemon & Tea Tree 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
